title: His Alms.
content:
Here, here I live,
    And somewhat give
    Of what I have
    To those who crave,
    Little or much,
    My alms is such;
    But if my deal
    Of oil and meal
    Shall fuller grow,
    More I'll bestow;
    Meantime be it
    E'en but a bit,
    Or else a crumb,
    The scrip hath some.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "His Alms."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
